title: Why you can never get your doctor to call you back
description: Like many AI companies automating work that humans currently do, Basata will eventually face a harder question about where the line is between augmenting workers and displacing them. For now, the founders say the administrative staff they work with aren't worried about that; they're more worried about drowning.
summary_cn: 本文聚焦AI医疗行政自动化公司Basata的落地实践。产品通过AI语音与消息处理技术，自动完成患者来电接听、分诊与日程管理，显著提升响应率并降低运营成本。对AI产品经理而言，其核心在于“增强而非替代”的设计哲学：聚焦行政高频痛点，以渐进式自动化降低组织变革阻力。商业价值明确，但需精准划定人机协作边界，为垂直AI落地提供参考。
